data.title: AppTech Expands Revenue Participation Financing Agreement With Ascendancy
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from AppTech ( (APCX) ).

On February 17, 2026, AppTech Payments Corp. amended its existing revenue participation agreement with Ascendancy Management, Inc., increasing Ascendancy’s total revenue participation contribution to $2 million, comprising $1.5 million paid in three $500,000 monthly installments starting November 15, 2025, and an additional $500,000 due by February 28, 2026. Under the revised terms, the participant is entitled to 1.75% of AppTech’s gross contract revenue, subject to adjustments and minimum monthly payments, with the participation running from November 1, 2025, through December 31, 2029, and AppTech obligated to repay the full contribution, explicitly characterized as not a loan, on a prorated, interest-free basis over the final 18 months of the term, signaling a continued reliance on revenue-linked financing rather than conventional debt.

The most recent analyst rating on (APCX) stock is a Sell with a $0.38 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on AppTech stock, see the APCX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on APCX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, APCX is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by weak financial performance—very large losses and persistent cash burn outweigh strong revenue growth and healthy gross margins. Technical momentum is currently favorable (price above key averages with positive MACD), providing support, while valuation is held back by negative earnings and the lack of dividend yield. A positive acquisition adds incremental upside potential but does not offset the near-term profitability and funding risk.

To see Spark’s full report on APCX stock, click here.

More about AppTech

AppTech Payments Corp. is a Delaware-based payments company that generates revenue from gross contract payments and enters into structured financing arrangements tied to its future revenues. Its business model supports the use of revenue participation agreements in which external participants receive a share of the company’s gross contract revenue over multi-year terms.

Average Trading Volume: 49,618

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $12.75M

data.title: Ferrari Publishes 2025 Annual Report and Files Form 20-F With SEC
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Ferrari ( (IT:RACE) ) has shared an announcement.

On February 19, 2026, Ferrari announced it had published its 2025 Annual Report and filed its annual report on Form 20-F with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, covering the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. The release also highlighted that Ferrari included a 2025 Sustainability Statement, prepared voluntarily under the European Sustainability Reporting Standard, underscoring the company’s increased transparency on environmental, social and governance matters for global stakeholders.

The reports are available to investors via the company’s corporate website, where they can be viewed and downloaded in full. Ferrari is also offering shareholders hard copies of the documents, including the audited financial statements, free of charge upon request, reinforcing accessibility of detailed financial and sustainability information to the market.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:RACE) stock is a Buy with a EUR438.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ferrari stock, see the IT:RACE Stock Forecast page.

More about Ferrari

Ferrari N.V. is an Italian luxury performance automotive manufacturer best known for high-end sports cars and racing-inspired road vehicles, with its shares listed on the NYSE and Euronext Milan under the ticker RACE. The company targets the global ultra-premium automotive market, combining exclusive vehicle production with a growing focus on sustainability and regulatory-compliant financial reporting for international investors.

Average Trading Volume: 557,053

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: €75.25B

data.title: EuroGroup Laminations Deal With FountainVest Investment Vehicle Collapses
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

EuroGroup Laminations S.p.A ( (IT:EGLA) ) has shared an update.

EuroGroup Laminations announced that a share purchase agreement for 45.7% of its share capital between Ferrum Investment, backed by FountainVest funds, and EMS Euro Management Services has been terminated, effective 16 February 2026. As a result, the related co-investment agreement and the template shareholders’ agreement, which would have governed future corporate governance and ownership structures, have also ceased or were never executed.

The terminated agreements had encompassed interim management undertakings and prospective arrangements for a new holding structure, including a planned TopCo and corporate vehicles through which EMS would have reinvested proceeds. Their cessation leaves the existing ownership and governance framework in place, and the company has made notice of this outcome publicly available via the Milan companies’ register, a national newspaper and its corporate website for the benefit of investors and other stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:EGLA) stock is a Hold with a EUR1.55 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on EuroGroup Laminations S.p.A stock, see the IT:EGLA Stock Forecast page.

More about EuroGroup Laminations S.p.A

EuroGroup Laminations S.p.A. is an Italian company listed on Euronext Milan that, together with its subsidiaries, operates as a group in its sector. The company’s shareholder base includes EMS Euro Management Services S.p.A., which previously held both ordinary and multiple-voting shares representing a significant portion of its share capital and voting rights.

Average Trading Volume: 657,650

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: €221.2M

See more insights into EGLA stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Norsemont Advances Choquelimpie Drilling as Early Results Support Resource Expansion
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Norsemont Capital ( (TSE:NOM) ) has shared an announcement.

Norsemont Mining has completed the first seven holes of its Phase 3 drill program at the Choquelimpie project in Chile, totaling 1,650 meters and targeting down-dip extensions of higher-grade gold zones within hydrothermal breccias. Drilling has been temporarily halted due to the seasonal Altiplano Winter, with operations expected to resume in April 2026 to finish the planned 5,000-meter, 20-hole campaign.

Initial assay results from the 2025 drilling, including two fully assayed holes and partial data from others, indicate intersections of higher-grade hydrothermal breccia bodies at depth, supporting the potential to expand the open-pit resource and overall breccia pipe dimensions. Management is also advancing planning and permitting for a more extensive Phase 4 drill program in 2026, underscoring a sustained effort to build resource confidence and scale at Choquelimpie.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:NOM) stock is a Hold with a C$1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Norsemont Capital stock, see the TSE:NOM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:NOM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:NOM is a Neutral.

Score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, widening losses, and persistent cash burn). Technicals are constructive with price well above key moving averages, but overbought RSI/Stoch temper the setup. Valuation is also constrained by negative earnings and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:NOM stock, click here.

More about Norsemont Capital

Norsemont Mining Inc. is a Canadian exploration company focused on advancing its Choquelimpie gold project in Chile. The company targets higher-grade gold mineralization hosted in hydrothermal breccia zones, with an emphasis on expanding open-pit resources and defining the size and continuity of breccia-hosted deposits in a key South American mining jurisdiction.

Average Trading Volume: 166,364

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$86.93M

Black Box Limited ( (IN:BBOX) ) has issued an announcement.

Black Box Limited has notified the stock exchanges that it has released the transcript of its February 12, 2026 earnings call discussing unaudited consolidated and standalone financial results for the second quarter and nine months of fiscal 2026. The disclosure, made under SEBI’s listing regulations, aims to provide greater transparency and ensure that all stakeholders, including investors and analysts, have equal access to the management’s commentary on the company’s recent financial performance.

The company’s communication underscores adherence to regulatory requirements and best practices in investor relations by formally disseminating the call transcript through the exchanges. data.title: Heritage Foods Wins Interim Court Order in Rs.100-Crore Defamation Battle
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Heritage Foods Limited ( (IN:HERITGFOOD) ).

Heritage Foods Limited has initiated a civil defamation suit in the Delhi High Court against Sakshi Media House and associated parties over what it describes as false, baseless and malicious publications and social media allegations aimed at damaging the company’s reputation. The company is seeking a permanent injunction to stop any further defamatory content, the removal of existing material from various platforms and damages of Rs.100 crore for harm to its reputation and business.

Following submissions by the company’s counsel, the Delhi High Court has granted interim relief restraining several defendants from publishing or reposting allegedly defamatory content against Heritage Foods and directing them to take down specific articles, reports and videos within 24 hours. If the primary defendants fail to comply, platform operators have been ordered to remove the content, underscoring the company’s proactive legal stance to protect its brand and providing reassurance to investors and stakeholders about its efforts to safeguard its goodwill.

More about Heritage Foods Limited

Heritage Foods Limited operates in India’s dairy and food processing industry, producing and marketing milk, dairy products and related food items for domestic consumers. The company focuses on building a strong brand reputation in its core markets, where trust, quality and public perception are critical to sustaining customer loyalty and stakeholder confidence.

Average Trading Volume: 17,760

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: 32.78B INR

For a thorough assessment of HERITGFOOD stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Shell Retires Over 3.4 Million Shares in Ongoing Buy-Back Programme
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Shell (UK) ( (GB:SHEL) ).

Shell plc has repurchased more than 3.4 million of its own shares across multiple venues in London and continental Europe on 19 February 2026, as part of its previously announced on- and off-market share buy-back programme. The transactions, executed in both sterling and euros, are for cancellation, directly reducing the company’s share count.

The buy-backs are being carried out by Morgan Stanley & Co. International independently of Shell within pre-set parameters and under UK and EU market abuse and listing rules. The programme, running from early February to early May 2026, underlines Shell’s ongoing commitment to returning capital to shareholders and could enhance earnings per share while signalling confidence in its financial position.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:SHEL) stock is a Buy with a £40.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Shell (UK) stock, see the GB:SHEL Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GB:SHEL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:SHEL is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by solid underlying financial profitability/cash generation tempered by softer recent free-cash-flow trajectory and rising leverage. Supportive earnings-call guidance (cost reductions, disciplined CapEx, strong shareholder returns) and constructive technical trend add confidence, while valuation (moderate P/E and ~3.9% yield) is an additional positive.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:SHEL stock, click here.

More about Shell (UK)

Shell plc is a global energy and petrochemicals company focused on oil, gas and expanding low-carbon energy solutions. Listed in London and other European markets, it operates across the energy value chain and is a major constituent of UK and European equity indices, making its capital allocation and buy-back activities closely watched by institutional investors.

data.title: Longino & Cardenal Targets Global Investors with Dubai Financial Gala Appearance
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

The latest announcement is out from Longino & Cardenal SpA ( (IT:LON) ).

Longino & Cardenal S.p.A., a Milan-listed supplier of rare and precious foods for high-end catering, is expanding its international visibility through participation in Integrae SIM’s “Financial Gala” in Dubai on 26 February 2026. The company, which already counts a large share of Michelin-starred restaurants among its 5,000 clients and operates across several key global gastronomic hubs, aims to reinforce its positioning as a reference player in premium food distribution.

The Dubai event, focused on Italian SMEs listed on Euronext Growth Milan, will connect Longino & Cardenal’s top management with the UAE financial and business community, potentially opening new growth and capital market opportunities in the region. Management presentations will be shared with investors via the company’s and Borsa Italiana’s websites, while the company has updated its 2026 corporate events calendar to reflect the initiative, underscoring its investor-relations focus and engagement with international stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:LON) stock is a Buy with a EUR2.20 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Longino & Cardenal SpA stock, see the IT:LON Stock Forecast page.

More about Longino & Cardenal SpA

Longino & Cardenal S.p.A. operates in the high-end food sector, specializing in the research, selection and distribution of rare and premium ingredients for top-tier catering. With more than 1,800 products and a network of about 80 agents, it serves around 5,000 clients, including 80% of Michelin-starred restaurants in its core markets, and maintains operations in Italy, Hong Kong, Dubai and New York.

data.title: Canstar Consolidates Mary March Land Package With Strategic Eagleridge Option
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Canstar Resources ( (TSE:ROX) ) has issued an update.

Canstar Resources has secured an option to acquire a 100% interest in the Eagleridge mineral claims adjoining its Mary March Project in central Newfoundland, consolidating control over the projected eastern continuation of the Mary March–Nancy April VMS system. The move fills a key gap in its land package within the prolific Buchans-Roberts Arm Belt, eliminating a property boundary that previously split the geological model and reducing the risk of competitive encroachment.

The newly optioned Eagleridge claims are being integrated immediately into Canstar’s fully funded 2026 exploration program, which includes high-resolution drone magnetics, ground IP, and borehole EM surveys to refine drill targets ahead of a major drilling campaign. The company has also secured a land access agreement with a local landholder to support its winter geophysics work, further enabling seamless execution of exploration across the entire Mary March target corridor.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:ROX) stock is a Sell with a C$0.08 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Canstar Resources stock, see the TSE:ROX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:ROX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:ROX is a Neutral.

The score is primarily weighed down by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses and cash burn, and negative/worsening equity with increasing debt). Technical indicators also reflect a soft trend with negative momentum. Valuation provides limited support due to negative earnings and no dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:ROX stock, click here.

More about Canstar Resources

Canstar Resources Inc. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on volcanogenic massive sulphide (VMS) targets in central Newfoundland. The company’s flagship Mary March Project lies within the Buchans-Roberts Arm Belt, a historic base metals district, where Canstar is building a district-scale land position through staking, acquisitions, and joint ventures.

Average Trading Volume: 151,985

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$15.78M

See more insights into ROX stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
